title: [MTR4] 前衛巴士 | Volvo B10TL w/ Wright Body
description: Resource pack that adds Volvo B10TL w/ Wright Body into Minecraft via Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
# 警告 | WARNING
玩家**嚴禁**使用此車作出任何重現2018年九巴872綫巴士翻側事故之行為，及/或使用本作品作出嘗試勾起任何傷痛回憶之行為。本人 (LX9702)有權因任何玩家作出上述行為停止公開本作品，亦不會對任何人士作出上述行為而導致其聲譽的損害負責。

請尊重死傷者及其家屬，多謝合作。

Players are **strictly prohibited** from using this video to recreate the 2018 KMB Route 872 Bus Overturning Accident, and/or from using this work to attempt to evoke any painful memories. I (LX9702) reserve the right to terminate the publication of this work if any player engages in the aforementioned conduct, and I will not be liable for any damage to the reputation of any person caused by the aforementioned behaviour.

Please respect the victims and their families. Thank you for your cooperation.

---

_A resource pack for Minecraft Transit Railway._

# Overview
In 2003, KMB ordered 100 B10TL (Super Olympian) (50+50 in 2 orders) with Wright Explorer body, to replace older Dennis Dragons, Leyland Olympians and MCW Metrobus. These buses feature Euro 3 engines with diesel exhaust catalytic converters, bringing their emission standards up to Euro 4. The distinctive new look at the time brings bus fans’ attention, and KMB named these buses “Avant-garde bus” (前衛巴士). These buses’ fleet prefix is AVW.
Between 2021 and 2023, these buses reached their retirement age and were all written off by 31st July, 2023, ending 42 years of operation for “Olympian” buses in Hong Kong.

This resource pack is to add the Volvo B10TL (with Wright Body) into Minecraft with Minecraft Transit Railway mod, made by Navi_LX9702 in 2026.

# Disclaimer

This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, the Kowloon Motor Bus Company (1933) Ltd, AB Volvo, and Wrightbus.
